caption:
My most requested thrift store to check out by my followers 📍 JAM 

It was good…
transcript: I'm trying to find the best thrift store in Japan, and a lot of people say, Jam is it. This store is heavily Americana curated. It has a military surplus section with a variety of camo prints, a crazy vintage Levi's curation. I don't know, vintage denim just hits different. Polo, Kaha, and heaps of vintage crews and tees. As you can tell, there's a lot of vintage. But do I think it's the best? No, I'm putting it fifth on my list, behind Rad Tag and above Kinji.
